'''lomagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubescent|pubescent]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubescent|pubescent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lomagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomagithi|lomagithi]] || [[word:lomagiji|lomagiji]] || [[word:lomagishi|lomagishi]] || [[word:lomagiki|lomagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomaguthuthu|lomaguthuthu]] || [[word:lomagujuju|lomagujuju]] || [[word:lomagushushu|lomagushushu]] || [[word:lomagukuku|lomagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomaguthu|lomaguthu]] || [[word:lomaguju|lomaguju]] || [[word:lomagushu|lomagushu]] || [[word:lomaguku|lomaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomagufthuf|lomagufthuf]] || [[word:lomagufjuf|lomagufjuf]] || [[word:lomagufshuf|lomagufshuf]] || [[word:lomagufkuf|lomagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomagethe|lomagethe]] || [[word:lomageje|lomageje]] || [[word:lomageshe|lomageshe]] || [[word:lomageke|lomageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomagothotho|lomagothotho]] || [[word:lomagojojo|lomagojojo]] || [[word:lomagoshosho|lomagoshosho]] || [[word:lomagokoko|lomagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomagotho|lomagotho]] || [[word:lomagojo|lomagojo]] || [[word:lomagosho|lomagosho]] || [[word:lomagoko|lomagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomagofthof|lomagofthof]] || [[word:lomagofjof|lomagofjof]] || [[word:lomagofshof|lomagofshof]] || [[word:lomagofkof|lomagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfthÃŸf|lomagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfjÃŸf|lomagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfshÃŸf|lomagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfkÃŸf|lomagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lomagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lomagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lomagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lomagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfthÃŸf|lomagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfjÃŸf|lomagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfshÃŸf|lomagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfkÃŸf|lomagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfthÃŸf|lomagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfjÃŸf|lomagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfshÃŸf|lomagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomagÃŸfkÃŸf|lomagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomagÃḊthÃḊ|lomagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lomagÃḊjÃḊ|lomagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lomagÃḊshÃḊ|lomagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lomagÃḊkÃḊ|lomagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomagathatha|lomagathatha]] || [[word:lomagajaja|lomagajaja]] || [[word:lomagashasha|lomagashasha]] || [[word:lomagakaka|lomagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomagatha|lomagatha]] || [[word:lomagaja|lomagaja]] || [[word:lomagasha|lomagasha]] || [[word:lomagaka|lomagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomagafthaf|lomagafthaf]] || [[word:lomagafjaf|lomagafjaf]] || [[word:lomagafshaf|lomagafshaf]] || [[word:lomagafkaf|lomagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lomagasha|lomagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomagshÃḋsha|lomagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomagrosha|lomagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomagmusha|lomagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomagyasha|lomagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomagnkshÃḋsha|golomagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomagnkrosha|golomagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomagnkmusha|golomagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomagnkyasha|golomagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lomamagasha|lomamagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomamagshÃḋsha|lomamagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomamagrosha|lomamagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomamagmusha|lomamagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomamagyasha|lomamagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomamagnkshÃḋsha|golomamagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomamagnkrosha|golomamagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomamagnkmusha|golomamagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomamagnkyasha|golomamagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lemÃḊgasha|lemÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lemÃḊgshÃḋsha|lemÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lemÃḊgrosha|lemÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lemÃḊgmusha|lemÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lemÃḊgyasha|lemÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golemÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|golemÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golemÃḊgnkrosha|golemÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golemÃḊgnkmusha|golemÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golemÃḊgnkyasha|golemÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lomfagasha|lomfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomfagshÃḋsha|lomfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomfagrosha|lomfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomfagmusha|lomfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomfagyasha|lomfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomfagnkshÃḋsha|golomfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomfagnkrosha|golomfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomfagnkmusha|golomfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomfagnkyasha|golomfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
